reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 강쥐랑 아침마다 러닝하는데 손으로 리쉬를 잡지 않아도 되니 너무 편해요^^오염이 되어도 물티슈로 닦으면 되니 관리도 편하고 항상 깨끗해서 좋아요~구매하길 잘 한듯 하네요 아주 만족합니다
reviews.content_en: I go running with Gangju every morning, and it's so convenient not having to hold the leash in my hand ^^ Even if it gets dirty, I can just wipe it with a wet wipe, so it's easy to maintain and always stays clean. I'm really satisfied with this purchase!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 목줄이 너무 너무 귀엽습니다. 애견카페 가서 어디 목줄이냐고 많이 물어보셔요. 저희 강아지가 중대형견인데 디자인도 이쁘고 무엇보다 두께가 두툼해서 마음에 들어요!
reviews.content_en: The collar is so so cute. When we go to the dog cafe, people ask us where we got the collar all the time. My dog is a medium to large breed, and I love the design, but most importantly, the thickness is substantial, which I really appreciate!

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content:
바깥 산책을 좋아하는데, 다니다보니 실외배변견이 되었어요.
여기저기 방수줄 찾아보딘 바잇미를 알고 사봤는데, 할인할 때 구매해서 조금 저렴하게 구매했어요. 어떤색을 살까 고민했는데, 상품받아보고 상품 퀄리티에 놀랬어요. 색감도 예쁘고, 부드럽고, 무겁지않고, 마감도 꼼꼼하고, 일부러 잠금장치있는 걸 사다보니 라지 사이즈 샀는데 튼튼해보이고 좋아요. 가위자는 산책할때 강아지가 잡아 당기다보니 풀어질 때가 있었거든요. 고민한만큼 잘 산것 같아요.
reviews.content_en: My dog loves outdoor walks, and through all that walking, he's become an outdoor bathroom dog. I searched everywhere for waterproof leashes and found BITE ME, so I bought it. I got it on discount so it was a bit cheaper. I was torn about which color to get, but when I received the product, I was amazed by the quality. The color is pretty, it's soft, lightweight, the finish is meticulous, and since I specifically bought one with a locking mechanism in a large size, it looks sturdy and I'm happy with it. With a regular scissor-type leash, it would come undone when my dog pulled during walks. I think I made a good choice after all that deliberation.

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content:
엄청 고민하다 바잇미를 알고 구매했어요. 
마침 방수목줄을 찾던 중 예쁜 색감때문에 또 고민하고 구매했어요.
상품 받아보고 핸드폰으로 보던 색감보다 더 예쁘고, 부드럽고, 가벼웠어요. 줄이 젖으면 잘 마르지도 않고 굉장히 찝찝하고, 세탁 후에도 잘 안마르고 냄새가  잘 안 빠지는데, 관리하기 편하겠어요.
reviews.content_en: I deliberated a lot before finding and purchasing BITE ME. I was looking for a waterproof collar, and I deliberated again because of the pretty colors before buying. When I received the product, the color was even prettier than what I saw on my phone, it's soft, and it's lightweight. When the leash gets wet, it doesn't dry well and feels quite uncomfortable, and even after washing it doesn't dry well and the smell doesn't go away easily, but it should be convenient to manage.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 저는 하네스보다 목줄을 선호하는 편인데 지금까진 맘에드는 목줄을 못찾고 한두번 쓰고 집에 굴러다니는 목줄 천지였어요! 애가 작아서 무게부터 버클까지 한개가 맘에들면 소재가 맘에안들구 이런식으로 일년 넘게 이것저것 사모으기만 하다가 방수 목줄이라길래 천소재에 생활 방수된 건줄알고 색이예뻐서 구매한건데 고무? 같은 느낌의 처음 써보는 재질이 왔더라구요! 결론은 요즘 완전 최애템이에요.. ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 사실 리뷰가 아니고 노란색도 재구매 하려구 들어온건데 생각나서 써요! 저한테는 어께에 매면 리드줄이 좀 길어서 최대한 줄여서 쓰느라 풉백이 바닥에 끌릴려고 하지만 ㅋㅋ 일단 색이 너무 예쁘구 한달내내 매일 써도 땅에 많이 닿는 부분 색조금 변한거 말고는 튼튼해요! 저는 그럼 다른색을 구매하러 가겠습니당 총총 아 저희 강아지는 2.3키로 비숑이에요! 겁이 있는편이라 큰소리 나는 버클이나 무거운 목줄은 들면 바로 도망가요ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: I prefer collars over harnesses, but until now I couldn't find one I liked, so I had collars just lying around at home after using them once or twice! Since my dog is small, if I like one thing from the weight to the buckle, I don't like the material, and this went on for over a year just buying different things. Someone mentioned a waterproof collar, and I thought it was fabric with water-resistant treatment, so I bought it because the color was pretty, but it came with a rubber-like material I'd never tried before! Anyway, the conclusion is it's my absolute favorite item these days.. lol I actually came here to repurchase the yellow color, not to write a review, but I'm writing this because it came to mind! For me, when I put it around my shoulder, the lead is a bit long, so I shorten it as much as possible and the clasp drags on the ground lol, but anyway, the color is so pretty and even wearing it every day for a whole month, except for the color slightly changing on the parts that touch the ground a lot, it's sturdy! So I'm going to go buy other colors 😄 Oh, our dog is a 2.3kg Bichon Frise! He's a bit fearful, so when he hears loud buckles or heavy collars, he just runs away lol

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 저는 하네스보다 목줄을 선호하는 편인데 지금까진 맘에드는 목줄을 못찾고 한두번 쓰고 집에 굴러다니는 목줄 천지였어요! 애가 작아서 무게부터 버클까지 한개가 맘에들면 소재가 맘에안들구 이런식으로 일년 넘게 이것저것 사모으기만 하다가 방수 목줄이라길래 천소재에 생활 방수된 건줄알고 색이예뻐서 구매한건데 고무? 같은 느낌의 처음 써보는 재질이 왔더라구요! 결론은 요즘 완전 최애템이에요.. ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 사실 리뷰가 아니고 노란색도 재구매 하려구 들어온건데 생각나서 써요! 저한테는 어께에 매면 리드줄이 좀 길어서 최대한 줄여서 쓰느라 풉백이 바닥에 끌릴려고 하지만 ㅋㅋ 일단 색이 너무 예쁘구 한달내내 매일 써도 땅에 많이 닿는 부분 색조금 변한거 말고는 튼튼해요! 저는 그럼 다른색을 구매하러 가겠습니당 총총 아 저희 강아지는 2.3키로 비숑이에요! 겁이 있는편이라 큰소리 나는 버클이나 무거운 목줄은 들면 바로 도망가요ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: I prefer collars over harnesses, but until now I couldn't find one I liked, so I had collars just lying around at home after using them once or twice! Since my dog is small, if I like one thing from the weight to the buckle, I don't like the material, and this went on for over a year just buying different things. Someone mentioned a waterproof collar, and I thought it was fabric with water-resistant treatment, so I bought it because the color was pretty, but it came with a rubber-like material I'd never tried before! Anyway, the conclusion is it's my absolute favorite item these days.. lol I actually came here to repurchase the yellow color, not to write a review, but I'm writing this because it came to mind! For me, when I put it around my shoulder, the lead is a bit long, so I shorten it as much as possible and the clasp drags on the ground lol, but anyway, the color is so pretty and even wearing it every day for a whole month, except for the color slightly changing on the parts that touch the ground a lot, it's sturdy! So I'm going to go buy other colors 😄 Oh, our dog is a 2.3kg Bichon Frise! He's a bit fearful, so when he hears loud buckles or heavy collars, he just runs away lol

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
바잇미 제품에 요즘 엄청 푹빠진 1인입니다...
충동구매 욕구가 엄청나네요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
바잇미 디자인이 너무 마음에 들고, 제가 원하는 구성이 완벽해서
요새 폭풍 구매중입니다 ㅎ ㅎ ㅎ 

특히 목줄.... 진짜 이건 ㅠㅠ 상줘야 돼
처음엔 아이 털에 낑겨서 아프진 않을까
면 목줄보단 그립감이 없어서 산책시 불편할까 고민이 됐고
'방수' 라는 특성에 꽂혀서 일단 질렀습니다
왠걸 😭 ㄹㅇ 미쳤어!! 진짜 더러워진 나머지 목줄 다 버렸습니다;;

면 목줄은 맨~ 날 빨고 말리고 빨고 말리고 
비오는날 다 젖고 그냥 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 불편 너무 불편...
심지어 목줄을 당겨도 실리콘 소재 특성상
텐션이 있어서 켁켁거림이 확실히 줄었어요 

면 목줄로 당기면 엄청 켁켁 거립니다..ㅠㅠ
단, 면 목줄보단 무게가 살짝 나가지만 
금세 적응해서 불편해하지도 않고 채워달라고 목을 대줘요🥹👍

정말이지... 빨고 말리는게 너무 너무 귀찮았는데
이건 방수라 물티슈로 문질문질해주면 새상품으로 돌아와요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 진짜 !! 최고 !! 

기존에 쓰던 민트 컬러는 박살이나서...재구매 했구요!
밤이나 신호등 건널때 눈에 띄게하기 위해서
오렌지 컬러가 더 많이 들어간 아프리콧 제품으로 결정했습니다🙌🙌
색감도 파스텔이라 촌스럽지도 않고
채우면 짱짱하니 두말할것도 없어용 ㅎ ㅎ ㅎ

주문한지 하루만에 와서 맘 편히 휴가 다녀올 수 있을듯요!!
🧡🧡 바잇미 너무 살앙해.. ㅠㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: I'm one of those people absolutely obsessed with BITE ME products these days... The urge to impulse buy is crazy lol I love the BITE ME design so much, and the configuration I wanted is perfect, so I'm on a buying spree right now hehe 😄 Especially the collar.... this really deserves praise 😭 At first I was worried it might hurt when my pup's fur gets caught in it, and I was concerned that without the grip feeling of a fabric collar, it might be inconvenient during walks. But I was hooked on the 'waterproof' feature so I just went for it. And wow 😭 Seriously, it's crazy!! I actually threw away my old dirty collars lol Fabric collars need constant washing, drying, washing, drying, and on rainy days they just get all wet, so inconvenient... really inconvenient... Plus even when I pull on it, because of the silicone material's properties, there's tension so the gagging is definitely reduced. With fabric collars, pulling causes a lot of gagging 😭 The downside is it's slightly heavier than fabric collars, but he adapted quickly and doesn't seem bothered by it. He even comes and puts his neck out to have it put on 🥹👍 Honestly... washing and drying was so so tedious, but this is waterproof so just wiping it with a wet wipe brings it back to looking brand new lol!! Really!! The best!! My old mint color one got destroyed so I repurchased it, and for visibility at night or when crossing traffic lights, I decided on the apricot product with more orange tones 🙌🙌 The color is pastel so it doesn't look tacky, and when you fill it, it's nice and snug, need I say more hehe 😊 It arrived the day after I ordered, so I can go on vacation with peace of mind!! 🧡🧡 I love BITE ME so much.. 😭😭😭

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
귀염둥이 울 아가입니당
너무 이쁜목줄이에요 색깔도 이쁘고 울강쥐에게 딱 잘어울려요
아쉬운건 사이즈미스로 ㅠㅠ S로 구매했어야 했는데
제일끝까지 쥴여서 채웠는데 미용하게되면 많이 헐렁거릴것같아요 ㅠㅠ 교환할지 고민했는데 이미 택을 때버린상태라
조심히 써야할거같네용
작은애기도 키우는 다둥이네인데 S로 하나더 구매해야되겠습니당 하네스만 쓰다가 목줄 써보는데 애들도 편하고 당기는것도
줄어드는것같아요
처음쓸때는 아무래도 버클이 많이 뻑뻑하긴하네요
쓰다보면 부드러워질것같아요
튼튼하게 오래쓰고 싶네용!
reviews.content_en: Our precious little cutie 💕 It's such a pretty collar, the color is beautiful and it suits my pup perfectly. The downside is I got the size wrong 😭 I should have bought size S, but I tightened it all the way to the end, and when she gets groomed, it'll probably be too loose 😭 I thought about exchanging it, but I'd already thrown away the tag, so I'll have to be careful with it. Since we're raising multiple pups, I need to buy another one in size S. I've been using harnesses, but now trying a collar, the kids are more comfortable and seem to pull less. At first, the buckle is pretty stiff, but I think it'll soften with use. I want to use it durably for a long time!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 이거 크로스백처럼 연결해도 되고, 이렇게 손목에 팔찌처럼 연결해도 되는데 크로스백처럼 매고 강아지 가슴줄과 연결하면 끈이 땅에 잘 끌리지 않고 제어하기도 딱 편한 길이랍니다. 양손이 자유로워서 날이 추울 때 양손 다 주머니에 넣고 산책 가능해서 정말 너무 편해요! 강아지와의 산책이 정말 편해졌어요.
reviews.content_en: You can connect this like a crossbody bag, or like this, connect it around your wrist like a bracelet, but when you wear it like a crossbody bag and connect it to your dog's chest strap, the leash doesn't drag on the ground much and it's just the right length for control. Both hands are free, so on cold days I can put both hands in my pockets while walking, and it's just so convenient! Walking with my dog has become so much easier.

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content:
솔직히 목줄은 소형견한테 무조건 나빠! 라는 한심한 주인이 저였어요. 처음에는 그래서 하네스 목줄을 사용했어요. 근데 산책을 너무 안좋아하고 자꾸 안갈려고 고집을 부리는 거예요.
그래서 그때부터 뭐가 문제일까 고민했죠.
처음에는 훈련을 열심히 했어요. 그래도 제자리 걸음인 느낌에 지쳐갈때쯤 저희집 강아지 특성이 생각나더라구요. 안기는 것도 별로 안좋아하고 몸 만지는것도 그닥 안좋아하는 아이가 하네스를?!

그래서 바로 목줄을 구매했죠. 사설이 길었죠? 이 목줄을 사용하고부터 아이가 산책을 제대로 하기 시작했어요ㅠㅠ 주인 몸에도 감을 수 있어서 두손 사용하기 편하니 완전 주인도 아이도 너무 룰루랄라한 산책이 가능하답니다.

색갈도 너무 이쁘고 기능도 좋고. 목줄이 없다면 안살 이유가 없어요! 개인적인 바람으로는 야광 목줄도 나왔으면 좋겠어요!!
reviews.content_en: Honestly, I was one of those thoughtless owners who believed collars are absolutely bad for small dogs. At first, I used a harness-type collar. But my dog really didn't like walks and kept refusing to go. So I started wondering what the problem was. At first, I trained hard. But around the time I was getting tired of it feeling like we weren't going anywhere, I remembered my dog's personality. He doesn't like being held much and doesn't really like being touched... so a harness?! That's when I immediately bought a collar. Sorry for the long story! After using this collar, my pup started properly walking 😭 Since I can wrap it around my body, using both hands becomes easy, so both the owner and pup can have a really fun and happy walk together lol Color is so pretty and the function is great. There's no reason not to get this collar! My personal wish is that they'd release a reflective version too!!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
방수되는걸 찾는데 많지가 않아서 무게랑 가격때문에 망설이다가 구입

가격이 넘 비싼 반려용품들을 보면 
그 작은돈으로 유기견들한테 보태고싶다는 ..
생각에  ..

이건 고무같은 느낌이라 조금 무게감있지만 그리 무겁고 하진않고
보호자 158키 보통체형에 상체에 반으로 걸어도 적당한 길이 나옵니다
두꺼운옷엔 힘들듯

색상 사진과같고 이쁩니다
연결하는게 약해보이지만 오래 사용했음해요

선물도 감사해요
reviews.content_en:
I was looking for a waterproof option, but there aren't many available, so I hesitated because of the weight and price before deciding to buy it.

When I see overpriced pet products, I think about using that money to help abandoned dogs instead...

This has a rubber-like feel, so it's a bit heavy, but not overly heavy. For a guardian who's 158cm tall with an average build, even wrapping it around half my upper body gives a decent length.
It might be difficult with thick clothing.

The color matches the photos and looks pretty.
The connection looks a bit fragile, but I hope it lasts a long time.

Thank you for the gift too!

reviews.name: 고****
reviews.content:
(장점)
1. 끈이 생각보다 튼튼합니다
2. 길이조절도 되고 버클이 있어서 좋습니다
3. 색감이 너무예뻐요!
4. 연결고리가 360도 회전되서 강아지가 움직여도 줄이 안꼬입니다

(단점)
생각보다 무게가있어서 소형견이 쓰기엔 힘들지않나 싶어요

이상 너무 만족스러웠습니다!
reviews.content_en:
(Pros)
1. The strap is sturdier than I expected
2. It's adjustable in length and has a buckle, which is great
3. The color is so pretty!
4. The connector rotates 360 degrees so the leash doesn't tangle even when my dog moves around

(Cons)
It's a bit heavier than expected, so I'm wondering if it might be tough for small breed dogs

Overall, I'm very satisfied!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
2년반정도 바잇미 방수리드줄 노란색 엄청 잘 사용했어요!! 매일 3번 산책 나갈때마다 바잇미 방수리드줄만 사용했는데 이번 크리스마스 이브에 갑자기 연결고리가 헐거워져서 새로 구매했습니다 s사이즈로 구매했다가 원래 쓰던게 m사이즈였던걸 알고 m사이즈로 교환받았습니다! 보라색 리드줄도 잘 쓰고 있는데 노란색이 너무 예뻐요!! 
이 리드줄 장점은 방수가 돼서 언제든 사용가능하고 일반 리드줄은 손이 쓸릴때가 있는데 요건 손 쓸릴일이 없어요 진짜 좋아서 이걸로 재구매했습니다 다음에 구매할 땐 노란색으로 재구매할게요😄
reviews.content_en:
I've been using the BITE ME waterproof leash in yellow for about 2.5 years and it's been amazing!! I used it every single day on all three of my daily walks, but suddenly on Christmas Eve the connector got loose, so I bought a new one. I initially purchased size S but realized I was originally using size M, so I got it exchanged for M! I'm also using the purple leash well, but the yellow is just so pretty!!
The best thing about this leash is that it's waterproof so I can use it anytime, and unlike regular leashes that can chafe your hands, this one doesn't at all. It's really great so I'm repurchasing with this one. Next time I'll definitely repurchase in yellow 😄

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
워터프루프에 꽂혀서 샀는데 색도 이쁘고 마감부분들이나 이런것도 신경써서 만든 제품같아요
끈이 매끈매끈 완벽방수재질에 탄력이 있는 재질입니다
다만 끈이 좀 많이 무거워요.
저는 괜찮은데 목걸이가 강아지가 살짝 무거울꺼 같다는 생각은 했습니다. 물놀이 자주가는 분 아니면 굳이라는 생각입니다
reviews.content_en:
I bought it because I'm obsessed with waterproof products, and the color is pretty and the finishing details show it was made with care.
The strap is smooth and has perfect waterproof material with good elasticity.
The only downside is that the strap is quite heavy.
It's fine for me, but I did think the leash might be a bit heavy for my dog. I'd say it's a must-have if you go water activities often, otherwise it might be unnecessary.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
수영할때, 바다 들어갈때 잘 사용했어요!
핸즈프리 터음 이용해보는데 너무 편해서 여행 다녀오고나서 산책 나갈때 매일 사용중입니다! 색이 너무 마음에 들고 젖지 않아서 너무 좋습니다ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en:
I've used it well for swimming and going into the ocean!
This is my first time trying hands-free and it's so convenient that I've been using it every day on walks since I got back from my trip! The color is exactly what I wanted and it doesn't get wet, so it's amazing 😄

reviews.name: 경****
reviews.content:
너무너무 예뻐요 색감 짱 
근데 아쉬운 점은 계절을 잘못 선택한 것 같아요 핸즈프리라 요즘 같이 추운 날 주머니 손 넣고 쓰기 너무 좋긴한데 재질이 천이 아니고 차가워지는? 소재라 밖에서 만지고 싶지 않아요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 여름에 살 걸 또 생각보다 먼지가 잘 붙어서 산책 다녀오고 물티슈로 슥 닦으면 때가 때가 엄청나요 
그래도 핸즈프리라는 점과 디자인에서 점수 다 드렸어요
reviews.content_en:
It's so so pretty, the colors are amazing!
But the downside is I think I picked the wrong season. Since it's hands-free, it's really convenient to use in cold weather like now with my hands in my pockets, but since the material isn't fabric and gets cold, I don't really want to touch it outside lol. I wish I had bought it in summer. Also, it picks up dust more than expected so when I come back from a walk and wipe it with a wet wipe, there's a ton of dirt buildup.
Still, I give it full marks for the hands-free feature and the design!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 너무너무 귀여워요 여름/겨울 아주 유용할것같고 생각보다는 때가 잘타요 ㅠㅠ일부러ㅜ바닷가 가서 사용하려고 준비해서 사용했는데 최고였어요
reviews.content_en: It's so so cute, it'll be really useful in summer/winter and it picks up dirt more than expected ㅠㅠ I intentionally prepared to use it at the beach and it was the best!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
하네스만 채우다가 웰컴딜기회로 주문했는데
너무 예쁘고 귀여워요..!
재질도 정말 특이한거 같아요.첨엔 털이 들러붙으면 어쩌지?라고 생각했는데 전혀~~~
색깔이  너무 상큼하니  귀여워요!
방수재질이라 여름엔 더 유용하지 싶습니다!ㅎ
reviews.content_en:
I was only using harnesses, but I ordered it with a welcome deal opportunity and
it's so pretty and cute..!
The material feels really unique too. At first I was worried about fur sticking to it, but not at all~~~
The color is so fresh and cute!
Since it's waterproof material, it'll be even more useful in the summer! 😄

reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content: 걷기대회 참가했었는데 다른 아이가 요 목줄하고 리드줄 하고 있더라구요~ 산 타는데 나뭇잎이나 흙도 안묻고 너무 좋아보여서 어디 제품인지 물어보고 집 오자마자 바로 구매 했습니다. 생각보다 더 튼튼하고 너무 맘에들어요!!
reviews.content_en: I participated in a walking event and saw another dog wearing this collar and leash, and it looked so good without getting any leaves or dirt on it that I asked what product it was and bought it right away when I got home. It's sturdier than I expected and I really love it!!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
13키로 사모예드 믹스랑 지내고 있습니다! 하네스보다는
목줄을 해야할것 같아서 찾아보다가 발견했는데 색깔이 너무 예뻐서 고르는데 힘들었어요ㅠㅠ!!
고민하다 고른 피스타치오..너무이쁘네요❤️
받자마자 바로 착용하고 산책나갔어요!
사이즈는 아주 넉넉해요!
reviews.content_en:
I have a 13kg Samoyed mix! I thought I needed a collar rather than a harness, so I looked around and found this. The colors were so pretty that it was hard to choose ㅠㅠ!!
After deliberating, I picked Pistachio and it's just so beautiful ❤️
I put it on right away and went for a walk!
The size is very generous!

reviews.name: 쩡****
reviews.content: 꺄 리드줄이랑 색 다르게 했는데 역시 이뻐요ㅎㅎ같은 색이든 뭐든 다 이쁠것같은데 젤 좋은건 목줄로 바꾸고 앞섬방지도 되고 방수도 되니까 좋아요(ღ’ᴗ’ღ)
reviews.content_en: Ah, I got it in a different color than the leash and it looks so cute ㅎㅎ I think any color would look pretty, but the best part is that I can use it as a collar instead, it prevents front-pulling, AND it's waterproof (ღ'ᴗ'ღ)

reviews.name: 구****
reviews.content: 보리는 타로밀크티 컬러로, 완두는 아프리콧 컬러로 세트구매 했어요💜🧡 컬러도 맘에 들고 비오는 요즘 날씨에 매일 하는 산책템으로 최고에용👍👍
reviews.content_en: I got a set for Bori in Taro Milk Tea color and Wandu in Apricot color 💜🧡 Love the colors and with all this rainy weather lately, it's the perfect everyday walking gear 👍👍

reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content: 걷기대회 참가했었는데 다른 아이가 요 목줄하고 리드줄 하고 있더라구요~ 산 타는데 나뭇잎이나 흙도 안묻고 너무 좋아보여서 어디 제품인지 물어보고 집 오자마자 바로 구매 했습니다. 생각보다 더 튼튼하고 너무 맘에들어요!!
reviews.content_en: I participated in a walking event and saw another dog wearing this collar and leash combo~ We were hiking and I noticed how it didn't get any leaves or dirt on it, looked so nice that I asked what brand it was and bought it right when I got home. It's way sturdier than I expected and I absolutely love it!!

reviews.name: 구****
reviews.content: 장마 시즌 대비해서 주문해서 잘 쓰고있오요💜 업그레이드 되면서 더 부드러운 소재가 된 거 같고, 컬러감도 너무 맘에 듭니다🫶🫶
reviews.content_en: Ordered it to prepare for monsoon season and been using it great 💜 It seems the material got softer with the upgrade, and I'm so happy with the color 🫶🫶

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
하네스만 있고 목줄이 없어서 구입해 봤어요
사이즈 괜찮고 색상도 이뿌네요
맘에 쏙
reviews.content_en:
I only had the harness without a collar so I bought this
The size is good and the color is pretty
Love it

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
1kg 아기 첫 리쉬에요 ❤️🫶🏻🐶
바잇미에서 첫 리쉬 사고싶엇는데 성공!
그리고 방수리쉬라 질질 끌려도 더러워지는게
덜한거같아서 좋아요!
산책하고 물티슈로 닦으니 깨끗해지네요~!

그리고 아기랑 잘어울리는 색이라 만족해요!
좀 더 크면 이제 마카롱 하네스도 사야겟어요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en:
This is my 1kg baby's first leash ❤️🫶🏻🐶
I wanted to buy the first leash from BITE ME and I did it!
And since it's a waterproof leash, even if it drags around,
it doesn't get as dirty which is great!
After walks I just wipe it with a wet tissue and it's clean again~!
And I'm satisfied because the color matches my baby perfectly!
Once baby gets a bit bigger I'll have to buy the Macaron harness too ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
13키로 사모예드 믹스랑 지내고 있습니다! 목줄이랑 세트로 같은 색으로 구매했어요! 길이도 길고 손잡이처럼 해도 되고 몸에 둘러도 되는제품인데 둘다 편하네요!!
고리도 엄청 튼튼해서 부서질 걱정은 없을것같아요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en:
I have a 13kg Samoyed mix! I bought the collar and leash set in the same color! It's long and can be used as a handle or wrapped around the body, both ways are comfortable!!
The rings are super sturdy so I don't think it'll ever break ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 색도 연보라색에 재질도 실리콘이라 오염에도 끄떡없을꺼같아 안심이에요
reviews.content_en: The light purple color and silicone material make it worry-free against stains

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 물건 받자마자 바로 산책 나갔다 왔어요. 기본 2 m 정도로 길어서활동 반경 넓어서 아주 좋고요 허리에 감을 수 있어서 너무 편합니다. 예전에 대형경 키울 때도 큰 사이즈로 사용했었는데 여름이나 겨울에 더러워지지도 않고 젖지 않아서 너무 좋습니다.
reviews.content_en: I went for a walk right after receiving it. It's about 2m long so there's plenty of room for movement which is great, and being able to wrap it around my waist is so convenient. I used the larger size when I had a big dog before and it never got dirty or wet in summer or winter, really great product.

reviews.name: 문****
reviews.content: 넘 예뻐요 ㅜㅜ 이렇게 좋은 제품 싸게 살 수 있어서 좋았어요~
reviews.content_en: It's so pretty ㅜㅜ I'm happy I could get such a great product at such a good price~

reviews.name: 효****
reviews.content:
소형견이지만 리드줄 넓이는 2센치 정도 되는걸 선호해서 하네스 S, 리드줄 M으로 구매했는데 딱 좋아요!
확실히 요즘 비오고 난 다음 나갈 때 입히면 좋은 것 같아요
기존 웨빙은 그냥 시커멓게 변색될 정도였는데 이건 그렇게 많이 묻어도 티도 안 나고 물티슈로 닦아주면 깨끗해지네요!
reviews.content_en: Even though she's a small breed, she prefers a leash about 2cm wide, so I got a harness in size S and leash in size M, and it's perfect! It definitely seems great to put on her before going out after rainy days these days. My old webbing harness would get really discolored, but even if dirt gets all over this one, it doesn't show, and it comes clean with a wet wipe! 👍

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 7개월령 8.5kg 똥갱쥐 M사이즈 잘 맞아요. 하네스보다 목줄을 선호하는데 장마기간이다 보니 기존에 사용중인 목줄이 금방 젖고 더러워지더라고요. 그래서 처음으로 워터푸르프로 구매해봤어요. 산책 다녀온 뒤 물티슈로 쓱 닦아주면 돼서 굉장히 편리합니다! 잘 사용할게요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: My 7-month-old, 8.5kg pup does great in size M. I prefer a collar to a harness, and since it's monsoon season, my regular collar gets wet and dirty so quickly. So I bought a waterproof one for the first time. After walks, I just wipe it down with a wet wipe and I'm done - it's super convenient! I'll keep using it well ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
줄이 생각보다 길군요
잘 쓸 것 같아요 색이 너무 예뻐요
reviews.content_en: The leash is longer than I expected. I think it'll work great! The color is so pretty 😍

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
바잇미어플에서 처음 이 리드줄이 나오자마자
사용해서 파손없이 지금까지 잘쓰고있던 제일 애용하는 산책줄이에요! 아무리 세척한다해도 아스팔트의 검은흔적들 실리콘재질이라 닦이지도않고 해서 사용하는데 문제는없지만! 새로 하나 더 사고싶어서 구매했어요 리뉴얼 되었다고 하는데 비교해보니
줄이 더 얇아졌고 그만큼 부속품도 좀더 작아졌네요! 불편한건없지만 얇아지니 그만큼 덜 튼튼한것같은..?! 연결하는 고리도 작아졌다보니까용 ㅠㅠ 더 좋게 업그레이두! 했다고하니 믿고 잘쓸게요~✨
벌써 10살이 된 개딸! 우리 오늘도 산책가자🤍
reviews.content_en: Ever since this leash first came out on the BITE ME app, I've been using it as my go-to walk leash without any damage! No matter how much I wash it, the black marks from asphalt don't come off because it's silicone, but it works fine! I wanted to get another one so I bought it. I heard it got renewed, and when I compared them, the leash got thinner and the accessories got a bit smaller too! It's not inconvenient but it does feel like it's less sturdy now that it's thinner...?! The connecting ring got smaller too ㅠㅠ They said it was an upgrade so I'll trust it and use it well~✨ My doggy is already 10 years old! Let's go for a walk again today 🤍

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
말랑말랑한 실리콘 제질이에요!
여태 써보던 천 하네스랑은 달라 촉감에 적응이 필요하지만 색감도 예쁘고 때도 방수도 된다니 맘에 듭니다 ㅎㅎ
아 그리고 매고다닐 수 있는 점도 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: It's made of soft silicone! It's different from the cloth harnesses I've used before, so it takes some getting used to in terms of feel, but the color is pretty and it's water-resistant and stain-resistant, so I love it ㅎㅎ Oh, and I really like that I can wear it all day!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 소재가 좋고 튼튼한 것 같습니다 관리도 용이할 것 같구요
reviews.content_en: The material seems good and sturdy. Management should be easy too.

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content:
쓰던걸 준건가요 b급 상품을 준건가요.
펜션 놀러가는데 비온다고해서 주문했더니만 받고보니 누가 반품한걸 준건지 뭔지 고리에 스크레치 나있고 얼룩 안지워지고...
리뷰 남기려고 보니 누구는 b급 상품 구매했다는 리뷰가있는데
저도 b급으로 주신건지요...?
제값 주고 구매한건데 짜증남 ㅠ 
심지어 지금 베스트 상품 아이템에 2만원때 상품도 팔고있는데 그건 2만원때니 그러려니 하겠는데 거즘 5만원 주고 산 난 왜 이모양임?
색깔은 이쁩니다 ㅠ
reviews.content_en: Did you send me a used one? Did you send me a defective B-grade product? I ordered it because it was supposed to rain when I was going to a pension, but when I got it, there were scratches on the ring like someone had returned it, and there were stains that won't come off... I was trying to leave a review and saw someone mention they bought a B-grade product, so did you send me a B-grade too...? I paid full price for this and I'm frustrated ㅠ Plus right now they're selling items for 20,000 won on the best items list, so I can let that slide since it's 20,000 won, but why does mine look like this when I paid almost 50,000 won? The color is pretty though ㅠ

reviews.name: 원****
reviews.content:
노란색이 밝아서 예쁜듯?.!
pvc 소재여서 줄 조절할때 좀 불편할까했는데 생각보다 부드러워서 좋음
reviews.content_en: The yellow is bright and pretty, right?.! I was worried it might be inconvenient to adjust the leash since it's PVC material, but it's softer than I expected so it's good 👍

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
왜 고민했나싶어요 너무 이뻐요
사세요사세요!!
3키로 포메인데 두꺼울까 걱정했거든요 s사이즈 딱이고
소형견에게 잘 맞게 나왔어요! 
고민하시는 분들 꼭 사세요!!
reviews.content_en: I wonder why I even hesitated - it's so pretty! Buy it, buy it!! I have a 3kg Pomeranian and I was worried it might be too thick, but size S is perfect and it works great for small breeds! If you're thinking about it, definitely buy it!!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
이뻐요 소재도 맘에 들어요 손바닥 전혀 안아프고 
산책후 물티슈로 슥 닦으면 깨끗해 지고 ....
목줄 10개 넘게 있지만 ㅎㅎ
다른색도 구매할꺼예여
reviews.content_en: It's pretty and I love the material! My hands don't hurt at all, and after a walk I just wipe it with a wet wipe and it comes clean.... I have over 10 collars ㅎㅎ I'm going to buy it in other colors too

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content:
강아지 입양하게 되었는데, 날씨도 그렇고 방수 되면 좋을거 같아서 알아보다 디자인이 너-무 ! 예뻐서 구매하게 되었습니당!
강아지 크면 다른 색으로 또 구매 해보려구요! 당근과 메론 색이에요 딱 너무 귀여워요~
reviews.content_en: We just adopted a puppy, and with the weather and all, I was looking for something waterproof, but the design is SO pretty! 😍 I ended up buying it! When my puppy grows up, I'm planning to buy another color! It's carrot and melon colors - they're absolutely adorable~ 🥕🍈

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 야외활동을 좋아하는 우리가족에게 아주 적합한 리쉬
reviews.content_en: A perfect leash for our family who loves outdoor activities!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 아프리콧 품절되어 피스타치오로 받았는데 너무 이뻐요~ 다들 잘 어울린다고하고 목욕할때 아직 도망가는데 잡기도좋고 완전 강추합니다
reviews.content_en: Apricot was out of stock so I got pistachio instead, and it's so pretty~ Everyone says it looks great on her, and even though she still tries to run away during bath time, it's easy to grab! Highly recommend! 💯

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 물놀이가거나 우중산책시 우용할듯해서 구입햇는데  색도 이뻐요 목23인토이푸들  사이즈조절되니 맞구요
reviews.content_en: I bought it thinking I'd use it for water play and rainy walks, and the color is really pretty too! It's for my 23cm Toy Poodle, and the size is adjustable so it fits perfectly 👍

reviews.name: 백****
reviews.content:
비가올때나눈이올때나 여름에물놀이할때나 딱!!
쵝오네요..번거롭게 목줄을뺐다꼈다할필요없습니다
강추강추
reviews.content_en: Whether it rains, snows, or for summer water play - it's perfect!! 🎉 You don't need the hassle of taking the leash on and off. Highly recommend! 💪

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 방수라서 마음에 들어요~목에 잘 맞아요~색깔이 이뻐요~^^
reviews.content_en: I love that it's waterproof~ It fits well around the neck~ The color is pretty~^^

reviews.name: 사****
reviews.content: 여기서 구매한 워터 목걸이는 제가 라지로 사서 아예 못 쓰고 있는데 이건 잘 쓸 것 같아요 ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: I bought a water collar from here in large size and I can't use it at all 😅 But I think this one will work great!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
장마철에 관리 하기  쉬울거 같아서 구입 했어요.
만족도는 최상 역시 편리 하네요.
가슴줄만 사용했는데 이번엔 목줄 주문했는데 적응력도 최고입니다.
reviews.content_en: I got it because I thought it would be easy to manage during rainy season. Satisfaction is top-tier - it's really convenient. I originally used just the chest harness, but this time I ordered the leash attachment and the adaptability is excellent.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 전에 쓰던 목줄도 바잇미제품이었는데 오래 썼더니 연결부품이 부러져서 다시 샀어요 색상도 이쁘고 방수라서 좋아요
reviews.content_en: I used a BITE ME product before, but after using it for a long time, the connector broke, so I bought another one. The color is pretty and I love that it's waterproof! 🐶

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 핸즈프리라 손이 자유로워서 산책할 때 편리하고 방수가 되어서 눈 비 올 때 좋은 것 같아요.
reviews.content_en: It's hands-free so my hands are free during walks, which is convenient, and it's waterproof so it's great for rainy and snowy days! 👍
